name: Case Study
history: Relationships sometimes shift into romantic connections. Past conflict in relationships following expressions of anger. Complex relationship with parents involving obligations.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I express my true feelings, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't change my past, so I am stuck with these feelings.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of conflict and emotional expression to prevent rejection.
situation: Difficulty completing work tasks due to fear of making mistakes. Procrastination and avoidance impacting productivity.
auto_thought: If I make a mistake, it will confirm that I am incompetent.
